---
name: Bug report
about: Report a tar archive that reads or writes incorrectly, or otherwise misbehaves
---

## Failing input

Attach or paste the archive (or a minimal reproduction) that triggers the
bug, and the code you called it with.

## Expected output

What should reading/writing have produced?

## Actual output

What did it actually produce (including any error/crash/hang)?

## Mojo version

Output of `mojo --version`.
